title: Secure first confirmed delivery partner
context: The project's definition of 'shipped' requires a named beneficiary who accepts and uses the output. Without a confirmed delivery partner, every task remains verifiedNeed: false and the success metric of '6 briefs in use' cannot be reached. The outreach thread opened in outreach-007 must convert to a confirmed commitment from at least one named beneficiary — an educator, newsroom, civil-society group, library, or humanitarian analyst who agrees to use the briefs/datasets.
objective: Secure a named, confirmed delivery partner who agrees to use the project's briefs and datasets, with the channel, use-case, and contact documented.
acceptanceCriteria: A named beneficiary organization or individual (educator, newsroom, civil-society group, library, or humanitarian analyst) confirms in writing that they will use at least one specific brief and dataset.
The partner's name, type, use-case (e.g. classroom instruction, data-journalism, grant writing), and delivery channel are documented in a committed record.
The requestor field for tasks targeted at that partner is updated to the confirmed partner name.
At least the tasks for delivered briefs that the partner has agreed to use are updated to verifiedNeed: true, with the partner confirmation recorded.
Delivery channel documented (e.g. direct email handoff, OER repository submission, Zenodo DOI shared with partner, republication link).
resources: tasks/food-security-briefs-outreach-007.json — existing outreach thread and candidate channels
output: A committed document recording the confirmed delivery partner, their name, type, use-case, delivery channel, and written confirmation of intent to use the briefs/datasets.
